response:
WITH monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)::date AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS signups
    FROM users
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
growth AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        signups,
        LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_signups,
        CASE WHEN LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) IS NULL THEN NULL
             ELSE (signups - LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month)) * 100.0 / LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month)
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM monthly_signups
)
SELECT 
    month,
    signups,
    growth_rate
FROM growth
ORDER BY month;
